gaps.title: Add TraitRoomModeResonance for sub-200Hz eigenfrequency simulation (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: While refreshing examples/audio/spatial-audio-showcase.refreshed.holo (concert hall scene), the composition wanted to model sub-200Hz room mode behaviour: standing waves, Helmholtz resonance, bass-node buildup in corners. The existing @reverb_zone trait handles broad RT60 and impulse-response convolution well, but provides no way to specify or visualise room eigenfrequencies. Proposed trait @room_mode_resonance would accept: room_dimensions (x,y,z in metres), mode_order (int, 1–5), materials_absorption map per surface, and emit per-mode frequency + Q-factor data. Downstream: spatial audio engines can place notch/peak filters at exact modal frequencies; visualisers can show bass-pressure heatmaps. Use case surface: concert hall, studio, immersive music, medical acoustics.
